# Experiment Report: [Experiment Name]

## 1. Metadata
- **Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
- **Experiment ID**: [e.g., EXP1-27]
- **Author**: [Name]
- **Status**: [Success/Partial/Failed]

## 2. Hypothesis & Objective
*Briefly state what was tested and why.*
- **Hypothesis**: [e.g., SHAP will have higher stability than LIME.]
- **Objective**: [e.g., Compare fidelity metrics across tree-based models.]

## 3. Experimental Setup
*Snapshot of the configuration used.*
- **Dataset**: [Name/Version]
- **Models**: [e.g., RF (n=100), XGBoost]
- **XAI Methods**: [Method 1, Method 2]
- **Metrics**: [Fidelity, Stability, Sparsity, Cost]
- **Key Parameters**:
  - `param_1`: value
  - `param_2`: value

## 4. Results
*Present key data. Usage of tables is encouraged.*

| Method | Metric A | Metric B | Metric C |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Method 1 | Val ± Std | Val ± Std | Val ± Std |
| Method 2 | Val ± Std | Val ± Std | Val ± Std |

## 5. Analysis
*Interpret the results.*
- **Observation 1**: [Interpretation]
- **Observation 2**: [Interpretation]
- **Trade-offs**: [Discussion of trade-offs, e.g., Speed vs Accuracy]

## 6. Anomalies & Deviations
*Document any bugs, crashes, or deviations from the original plan.*
- **Issue**: [Description]
- **Resolution**: [How it was fixed or mitigated]

## 7. Conclusion & Next Steps
*Final verdict and recommendations.*
- **Conclusion**: [Summary]
- **Next Steps**: [Follow-up experiments]
